_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Performance measurement involves collecting and interpreting data to identify how a team, product or service is performing.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business stakeholders in terms of business impact rather than technical metrics.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.485), DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.470).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.1/10 (raw 0.213). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [collecting, data, identify, interpreting, involves, measurement] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, communicating, findings, impact, limitations, metrics] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.859, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.9%). "Performance measurement involves collecting and interpreting data to identify ho" and "Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.346 > STS 0.213 (gap +0.134). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [collecting, data, identify, interpreting, involves, measurement]. WIDAI terms: [business, communicating, findings, impact, limitations, metrics].
